name: Pour La France Chocolate Decadence
recipeIngredient: Raspberry Sauce (8 oz fresh or frozen raspberries, Granulated sugar to taste, 2 teaspoons liqueur such as Grand Marnier or Chambord or dry Marsala)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe from Pour la France Bakery and Cafe, 7959 Broadway, San Antonio. Tx.
1. Melt butter and chocolate together over very low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Set aside to cool completely.
3. Whip eggs with an electric mixer until they reach full volume, approximately 7 minutes.
4. Carefully fold in the cooled chocolate mixture, sugar, and flour into the egg whites.
5. Pour batter into a greased and lined 10-inch cake pan (wax paper or parchment paper).
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes. Be careful not to overbake.
7. Cool completely to room temperature before removing from the pan.
8. To serve, spoon whipped cream on top of sliced Chocolate Decadence and then top with a spoonful of Raspberry Sauce.
Raspberry Sauce:
1. Combine fresh or frozen raspberries (thaw if frozen), granulated sugar to taste, 2 teaspoons liqueur such as Grand Marnier, Chambord, or dry Marsala in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over low heat.
3. Refrigerate until serving time.
